item.title: Never forget Aitzaz Hasan
item.description: The fearless young hero who stopped a suicide bomber from entering his school and saved hundreds of lives, 2014 On January 6th, 2014, 15-year-old Aitzaz Hasan looked death right in its eyes and challenged it. The young man was attending his high school in Hangu Village in Pakistan, which had a reputation for anti-terrorist attitudes. The school had an estimated student body of 2,000 students. As he was walking to school with two friends, Hasan noticed a suspicious man walking towards the school, who seemed like he was carrying something under his clothes. Hasan and his friends then noticed there was a detonator attached to under the man's clothing. This mysterious man was a suicide bomber who was about to walk into the school to murder as many children as possible. Hasan made his way towards the terrorist while ignoring his friend's pleas not to. Hasan said to them "I'm going to stop him, he is going to school to kill my friends". Hasan's friends ran inside the school to raise the alarm. Hasan, however, stood his ground. He threw a rock at his attacker but missed. With no other options, Hasan charged the terrorist and tackled him to the ground. In response, the terrorist activated the detonator, killing himself as well as Hasan. Hasan was the only death as a result of the blast. His heroic actions saved many lives that day. His school was renamed Aitzaz Hasan Shaheed High School. General of the army staff Raheel Sharif said that Aitzaz Hasan is "a national hero, who has sacrificed his today for our tomorrow." He is also described as a "symbol of resistance against terrorism." He has also been named as a martyr of Pakistan. He also received an award for his bravery. Hasan's family was given compensation. His father said, "My son made his mother cry but saved hundreds of mothers from crying for their children." The 2016 film, Salute, is based on Hasan and his heroic actions.
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.title: Early Cake day dump!
item.description: Cat tax
item.dc:creator: WalkItOutLikeTheFlash

item.title: My 8th Cake Day contribution
item.description:
Susi Vidal
GD burger I don’t typically post anything, and my favorites are typically recipes, books, stuff that made me laugh, or the occasional beautiful woman. So since it’s apparently my Cake Day I decided to post two from my favorites that hit a lot of those favorites… a beautiful woman, cooking, and making me laugh. The post I got this from says you can find more of her “OnlyPans” videos at https://instagram.com/susividal and that her name is Susi Vidal, but I don’t use Instagram so I make no promises. I hope you all have a great year and a safe and happy Holiday.
item.dc:creator: froggyzoomzoomEABOD

item.title: I'm a mostly WFH worker, but..
item.description: Kind of just shouting into the void as I am constantly thinking about these things and ways to improve the quality of life for everyone, sometimes it's good to have feedback and hear different POV in order to keep improving those ideas. It's almost a hobby, I guess, but probably just an exercise in futility. It's no secret that most people lose a lot of their own time to having to commute to work and then have to decide whether to use their remaining personal time for chores and basic tasks to stay healthy or to neglect all of that and have some pleasure time. The 8-8-8 hour, work-personal-sleep day cycle is no longer a viable or fair system in the modern age, and we are constantly losing more of our personal time due to being increasingly exploited by the rich and powerful for no other reason than pure human greed. There would be many immediate and flow on effects that would benefit society as a whole and improve everyone's quality of life. We need to evolve past these basic human desires of greed, hate (justifications to harm one another) and lust for power, stop treating each other as the enemy or as simply a thing to be exploited, and unite under a common enemy - human suffering - and start trying to improve the quality of life for all, including future generations.
item.dc:creator: AbrasiveKrab

item.title: ACAB? Yes Especially this one...
item.description: Kirk Taylor Martin Case Summary Kirk Taylor Martin, a former jail guard from Acworth, Georgia, was involved in a high-profile criminal case concerning the sexual assault of his ex-girlfriend. In March 2019, Martin, then 28 years old, was arrested on multiple charges after allegedly holding his ex-girlfriend against her will in her home and sexually assaulting her. The Georgia Bureau of Investigation (GBI) reported that the assault lasted from Thursday afternoon until Friday morning. The victim was able to seek help after contacting someone outside the home​​​​. Martin was charged with rape, aggravated sexual battery, aggravated assault, criminal attempt to commit sodomy, false imprisonment, and obstructing an emergency call. The evidence included an affidavit where Martin admitted to "letting things get too far" and explained that he had recently broken up with the victim. The assault reportedly began while the victim was in the shower, and Martin admitted to pinning her down. Post-assault, the victim stated that Martin locked her in a closet and later threatened to kill himself with a gun found in her house​​​​. Prior to this incident, Martin was dismissed from his role at the Murray County jail for policy violations unrelated to inmate welfare, including an instance of administering wrong medication to an inmate​​. He was later convicted and received a sentence of five life terms for his crimes​​. ?? Just so you know, my main focus is enhancing the context of social media posts that often lack it. If you'd like to see posts with more clarity and background information, consider following me. https://newschannel9.com/news/local/former-murray-co-detention-officer-gets-5-life-sentences-in-aggravated-rape-case
item.dc:creator: BibiBlocksberg

item.title: A dump of all the things on my phone pt 2 Saving for posterity
item.description:
If you havent checked out Awoo comics you should. Theyre great
This is one I made myself.
The boy? Deployed
The first of many frog memes to come
The first like 3 seasons of Jackie Chan Adventures was the shit
I just thought this one looked cool.
Mr. Bubz!!!!!
Classic Terry
More avatar
I wish to attain the spiritual chill of a capybara someday
If you dont talk to an animal in a weird voice are you even human?
Im more amazed they got this husky puppy to sit still for the picture tbh
If you dont read this in Picolos voice youre missing out
This one always cracks me up
Also crab memes incoming
A gargoyles meme!
I dont speak or read spanish but I have just enough context to figure this one out
I just love the idea of a talking duck interrupting this convo. Like just imagine a duck with Gilbert Gottfrieds voice walking up and saying this line
I have a friend who said this all the time
This one also is just hella cool
THE FROG!
RESPECT. THE. DEATH BLADES
Theres just not enough good Sokka/Suki content out there

item.title: It's meme dump day... Again... Vol 88
item.description:
Oof, helloooo friends. Been feeling big time like this lately and now I am sick with a minor cold and it just feels like the last straw.
Hobbes' tummy is a real life saver.
Good source.
.
I have no idea why that says ted Cruz lol I did not notice that before.
Yes
Ugh I have felt a giant wellspring of words trapped in my chest lately and they just will not emerge
@GingerSnark I know I sent this to you already, but it does make me think of you every time.
.
Lol I am basically Pooh in that frame right now.
Welllll some of it.
.
Oh tumblr.
I love hearing about people's musical interests.
They're here to recover my mangled corpse.
Worth it.
Sign me the fuck up.
Appropriate to the circumstances, definitely. Plus I'm already on the maximum dose so what can ya do.
Living in daydreams.
How I've felt since reading the Bible as a kid. My family still doesn't get why I won't come back to church.
Also yeah it's more hilarious to be a terrible person (but like in a funny way not in an actually terrible way.)
Sent this to my siblings immediately. Ahh the good old days.
Nooo let me stay one with the moss.
This is where I post from
Ooops.
Yum.
Who is to say it's not a bit of both?
I need more weed though.
My kind of party.
.
Hmmm. Please don't mark me mature this time, it completely killed my last dump.
It will be fine, come on.
.
The best.
.
My husband 1000%
Repeat after me: Nobody wants unsolicited dick pics.
Look at that precious trouble maker.
Ok tbh this is a killer line.
Soup!
....damnit.
This used to be me but now I've just given in to the dramatic and start with a giant wing.
Fuck, someone get me a cane.
Bah, indeed.
.
Do they though
Bro.
Art tax from the archives.
Hobbes being my little caretaker
He is just always on top of me. Making sure I'm okay and also available to pet his face whenever he desires. I hope you're having an okay week, imgur :)

item.description: I know the world has been focused on the horrors unfolding in Palestine, but don't forget the citizens of Iran are still being oppressed. Those who participated in the hijab protests are being tracked down and jailed...or worse.

3. Filters OFF

30
31. Thanks for making it all the way trough. I wanted to let you know that if you liked the humor of this dump, you might like a funny Stanley Parable game I'm making. Well kinda funny, I don't know, man. Making people laugh is hard and I suck. Anyway check out the game on Steam and wishlist if you like: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/

item.title: Hit & Run in Portland, Oregon.
item.description: A young woman with three of her young children in the car was struck by a 1999ish Dodge Dakota (2wd). Video is not my own, I obtained it from the camera car's dashcam to send to the victim, as I'm the only one who knew how to quickly do that.

item.title: boggart's phone clearing dump 4
item.description:
welcome, welcome
come one come all
another phone clearing dump is upon us
a whopping 30 images
for you to peruse and enjoy
always good to get these out
first thing in the morning
a dump to help with your dump
or if you're down in the dumps
maybe this dump will help
i hope it does
i hope two strangers can help make each other's day
it's worth a shot
we can make it
we can get out of these dumps together
baaaaacon
cheeeeeeese
I'd like to draw
i never have any idea of what to draw
in any case i better get back to work
someone has to sit around and do fuck all
lol jk i do inventory
but i still find time to post and browse
so there's definitely worse jobs
word of the day: multifarious
multifarious - adj. - many and of various types
the multifarious carbs of the world keep me going
cabbage cat havin a little nappa
anyways take care
and have a good one

item.title: Underreported Biden has wiped away over $125 billion in student debt through loan forgiveness and reform
item.description:
https://www.cnbc.com/2023/10/29/biden-administration-has-forgiven-127-billion-in-student-debt.html
Source: https://www.cnbc.com/2023/10/29/biden-administration-has-forgiven-127-billion-in-student-debt.html
Let's go Brandon!
This year the Biden admin has also created the SAVE plan, which may benefit student with high loan balances.
https://www.cnbc.com/2023/08/31/save-student-debt-repayment-plan-pros-and-cons.html The article has some of details about the plan and who it is meant for. And if you haven't already, you may want to check this loan review to see what is the best of the repayment plans for you. https://studentaid.gov/loan-simulator/ See also: this Beau of the Fifth Column video about reforms and student debt: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3Xe-Q8ORfWo Reposted because imgur cut out the last image last time.

item.title: Me and my sphere -- 16 tons of dry stone sculpture
item.description:
I've been working with stone for 26 years now. Beginning to get comfortable with the medium. Wall, sphere and patio, completed December 2022
This is my seventh sphere of this type. As I get better, I'm able to incorporate ideas that I've had in mind for years, such as this inlay connecting sphere with patio and wall.
Ponder more of my stone art: https://www.devineescapes.com/stone-art-gallery-2/ Follow: https://www.instagram.com/devineescapes/ Thank you for looking!
item.dc:creator: DevineEscapes

item.title: Saying goodbye sucks
item.description: As an only child, much of my life was just me and my mom. We struggled, as moms and daughters do, and things got worse after I had kids. She wanted to spend time with them, but I pushed back with work, school, and health reasons that it wasn't a good time. She was diagnosed with breast cancer and underwent intensive chemo treatments and beat it! But she was sensitive, and then Covid came. I put more distance between us, in my mind to keep her safe. I was there, but not as much as I should have been. In October, after she stopped taking my calls I went to her house. I found her (mostly) non-responsive on the floor. She said she had been there a couple hours but I fear that she was there for up to a day and a half, unable to move. She was rushed to the ER and an MRI showed multiple tumors on her brain. She was transferred to another hospital and underwent brain surgery. She recovered better than anyone expected and was back on her feet quickly. She was discharged but struggled being at home and was readmitted hours later. At this other hospital she kept improving and they were helping make sure her house would.be ready for her this time. She started noticing hair loss from the radiation around this time. She was getting weaker and we hoped it was her body needing a break to regain strength. Instead it was double pneumonia. She was transferred back to the same hospital where she had her brain surgery barely a month ago. Her nurses were impressed with her progress, said she was off oxygen and should be strong enough to go home in a couple days. Flash forward to this morning. I was at her house gathering things that might make her more comfortable at the hospital when my phone rang. Her doctors impressed upon me the urgency and I dropped everything and drove 2 hours to be here. She held on and has been fighting with every ounce of her strength. This woman is one of the most stubborn people I've ever known. She is still here but the doctors say it's time to let her go. I don't know how to go on without her. This unhappy first post is my way to scream into the void since that's typically frowned upon in hospital settings. Mama, I love you forever and always. I hope you find your peace at last. Know you will be missed.
item.dc:creator: GitanaMaya
